title: stelis torulosa
intro: Stelis torulosa, also known as the fragrant Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Stelis torulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Stelis torulosa can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and its flowers and leaves are used in traditional folk medicine to create teas and other medicinal preparations.
